name: ord
description: Language support and ORDeC integration for the ORD language

commands.title: ORD: Open Active File in ORDeC Viewer
ORD: Open Current View in ORDeC Viewer

ord.viewer.command.markdownDescription: Command used to launch the ORDeC local viewer. Supports `${workspaceFolder}`, `${extensionPath}`, `${file}`, `${fileDirname}`, `${fileBasename}`, and `${fileBasenameNoExtension}` placeholders.

ord.viewer.args.markdownDescription: Extra arguments passed before the extension-managed ORDeC viewer flags. Supports `${workspaceFolder}`, `${extensionPath}`, `${file}`, `${fileDirname}`, `${fileBasename}`, and `${fileBasenameNoExtension}` placeholders.

ord.viewer.cwd.markdownDescription: Working directory used when launching the ORDeC viewer. This usually needs to match `ord.viewer.moduleRoot`.

ord.viewer.moduleRoot.markdownDescription: Root directory used to derive the Python import path for the active `.ord` file. The active file must be inside this directory.

ord.viewer.env.markdownDescription: Extra environment variables for the ORDeC viewer process.

ord.viewer.hostname.description: Hostname passed to the ORDeC viewer process.

ord.viewer.port.description: Port passed to the ORDeC viewer process.

ord.viewer.urlAuthority.markdownDescription: Optional `host:port` authority that ORDeC should embed into the printed/opened viewer URL.
